title: fumaria capreolata subsp. capreolata
intro: Fumaria capreolata subsp. capreolata, also known as ramping fumitory or wood fumitory, is a perennial plant species in the fumitory family (Fumariaceae) with a history of medicinal use. Traditionally, the plant has been valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The medicinal properties of Fumaria capreolata subsp. capreolata have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Fumaria capreolata subsp. capreolata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with different health conditions.
